item.title: Absolutely perfect!
item.description: I can confirm that last part works, at least with my kids it does. When my daughter was 16 we had moved so in her new school she made new friends. I agreed she could go and have a sleepover in a friends house... About midnight I got a phone call, they had been drinking and it was her first time being drunk, she hated it and thought she 'was dying' (I think most of us have been there lol) she just wanted me to come and get her... When I got there all her friends thought she'd be in trouble, they were shocked when I said absolutely not because she rang me, I explained she'd have been in big trouble if I found out the next day and she hadn't told me, that then the trust would be broken. It worked, the hangover was punishment enough any way because still now, 6 yrs later she hates getting drunk and doesn't let herself get that far! So talk to your kids, let them know that they can trust you and that trust goes both ways, always make sure they know they can reach out when they're in a bad situation, whatever that may be!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: RIP Henry. You were an absolute legend.
item.description:
This is Henry, circa 1992, sporting his wife's summertime one-piece.
...and his subsequent rejection letter from Playgirl Magazine. I'd like you all to take a moment to remember Henry Belleville, father of one of my best friends Ed. He arrived at his stop at the end of the line last night, around 10:30pm. He was known for his amazing sense of humor, his willingness to help anyone out of any trouble they may have been in, and his absolute dead-ringer chili. Ed was going through his father's belongings and found the above picture and letter in an unmarked envelope. Rest in peace, Henry. You've earned it. I'll always remember sipping whiskey with you and hearing embarrassing stories about Ed when he was a little kid. Until we meet again, my friend, may god hold you.
item.dc:creator: WorstWurst

item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: Data visualization is my passion!
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: I literally used to spend winters in my car. What is this life?
item.description:
I'm just stunned. The title is not a joke, in ~7 years I went from battling homelessness with the equivalent of a 6th grade education, to conducting science & engineering research in the Amazon and doing cool things for space. I just... am overwhelmed. To think, if I'd actually succeeded in taking my life all those years ago, I would have missed all of this. Edit, copied from a comment: TlDr I help design habitats in space, which means creating (regenerative!) ecosystems from scratch, which means accounting for the nutritional, medicinal, and psychological needs of astronauts for ~generations~. The Amazon rainforest is not only the greatest hub for biodiversity on the planet, but contains tons indigenous knowledge that has been lost/ignored over the centuries. I'll be conducting experiments there that will end up in designs for habitats on Mars/space stations/etc.
Here's a cat tax. However you are doing today Imgur, I hope your tomorrow is even better. You're worth the time it takes. ❤️
item.dc:creator: TalleyZorah

item.description: We are in a Climate Emergency. Vote for Green Policies. Protest against Big Oil and those who insure it. Join a local group like Green Peace or Extinction Rebellion. item.title: Bottom shelf attempt #2
item.description:
I'm posting again without the meme (that I stole from the front page the other day) https://imgur.com/gallery/XvcGPcN So, hopefully this one won't get modded because I spent a lot of time harvesting these memes off the bottom shelf.
BSV here to uncensor your censored memes
It's me & Ellie ❤️
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooo (again)
I'll post the original in the comments.
Twitch chat voted, and tonight @frothystout and I are eat the world's HOTTEST chocolate before reading you a bedtime story "Go The Fuck To Sleep" tune into twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka at 10:00 pm CST to watch me suffer
The Bottom Shelf Community sends me the weirdest shit. Thanks for the card...that never ends, @@Phoenix0153
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Still unsure about the server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Doggie Dump
item.description: If you have some spare dollars, think about donating to Waggle or another dog charity. Or share my story about metal crates and a little man called Gus. We're hoping to have a happy ending! https://gofund.me/04535cf0
